violations.description: Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. -Sandwiches in the hot hold are at 120 F and not time stamped.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Stove top used to cook proteins not under a vent hood.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. -Sandwiches in the hot hold less than 140 F are not time stamped.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over stove.
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
